title: Hypixel BedWars+ Enhanced
description: Small improvement for Hypixel BedWars, removing inconsistency between game's and server's color names and textures. (item colors will match team colors). Both adjustments should work with other resourcepacks.
body:
Hypixel BedWars+ Enhanced is an expanded version of [Hypixel BedWars+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hypixel-bedwars-+), which was made to remove inconsistency in game's and server's color names (item colors will match team colors). 
Additionally, this version of the pack also swaps the wool colors for cyan and light blue - so that the wool Aqua team uses better fits the dyed armor color. 

Both adjustments *should* work with _all_ resourcepacks.

**Name Changes:**

Lime -> Green

Cyan -> Aqua


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ![Green Wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2157ff81b315c6ce894a888c68c58b835d31d1e.png)

  ![Aqua Wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3bb9c43711231b1c28893c1b52d737f75753594.png)

</details>


**Wool texture Changes:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Enhanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8552b68ce3d7a5915eaaf7f5d33788881489e4d1.png)

![Enhanced 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e9fc88cfe5ec7d9cb24894738a99804368f3fc.png)

</details>

*If you only want the language adjustment, please use the standard verion of [Hypixel BedWars+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hypixel-bedwars-+).*

The language adjustment is only available for English (US).

For now only available for 1.8.9, I don't rule out the possibility of an update in the future but it is not high on my priority list for now.



If you find any issues or inconsistencies I missed, please let me know. _(Contact information is in my bio)_


**NOTE:** I have not updated this since originally releasing it, and haven't played bedwars in years. Sorry if this pack is outdated now.



This is a reupload of the language pack from its [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hypixel-bedwars). Expect any updates I may do to this pack in the future to only be made on its Modrinth pages.
